heading: Today
text: Mostly sunny north; mostly to partly sunny south. Highs from the mid 60s to around 70. Winds becoming northwest 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 30s to lower 40s, some lower 30s in northern cold hollows, and some mid 40s in the Champlain Valley. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of a late-day shower near the Massachusetts border. Highs in the low to mid 60s in the south, mid 60s to around 70 north. Light winds, variable to southeast.
